Advanced Sports Medicine & Injury Care

Precision • Performance • Return to Sport

Welcome to the Sports Medicine portal of Dr. Sumedh Magar, M.S. Orthopaedics, a fellowship-trained specialist in sports orthopaedic surgery, rehabilitation and high-performance athlete care. With world-class credentials and a deep commitment to athlete-specific recovery, Dr. Magar combines surgical excellence and advanced rehabilitation to get you back in the game stronger than ever.

About Dr. Sumedh Magar – Your Sports Medicine Specialist

Dr. Magar holds a Masters in Sports Medicine, Exercise & Health from the University College London (UK), a Diploma in Football Medicine from FIFA, and completed an ISAKOS Fellowship in Arthroscopy & Adult Reconstructive Surgery.

He serves as Lead – Sports Medicine for the Khelo India programme at Balewadi Sports Complex, Government of Maharashtra, and is the Founder Director of I-SPORT Medical Centre, Pune.

An accomplished former national-level swimmer and basketball player, he merges his athletic experience with orthopaedic expertise. At I-SPORT, he brings advanced arthroscopy, joint preservation, regenerative orthobiologics and sport-specific rehabilitation under one roof.

What is Sports Medicine?

Sports Medicine is a specialized branch of orthopaedics focused on prevention, diagnosis, treatment and return-to-sport planning of musculoskeletal injuries and movement dysfunctions.

Injury Assessment

Comprehensive biomechanics & movement analysis

Treatment Management

Conservative and surgical management of sports injuries

Performance Optimization

Enhancement and prevention of re-injury

Return-to-Play

Structured protocols tailored to each athlete

Sports Medicine and Performance

Sports Medicine & Rehabilitation

  • Sports Injury Prevention Programs
  • Performance Analysis & Optimization
  • Movement Analysis Testing Laboratory
  • Return-to-Sports Rehabilitation Protocols
  • Athlete Health Management
  • Performance Enhancement Strategies

Conditions Treated

Comprehensive care for a wide range of sports-related injuries and conditions

🦶Foot & Ankle

Plantar Fasciitis

Inflammation of the sole plate common in runners/athletes

Achilles Tendinitis

Overuse or sudden loading of the Achilles tendon

Peroneal Tendinitis

Lateral ankle tendon irritation in cutting sports

Ankle Sprain

Ligament injury from twisting or unstable landings

Ortho-Biologics & Regenerative Medicine

Advanced regenerative treatments to accelerate healing and support tissue repair

PRP Injections

Platelet-Rich Plasma to stimulate tendon/ligament healing in overuse injuries

Stem-Cell Therapies

Orthobiologics for cartilage damage and early arthritis in athletes

Cartilage Regeneration

Advanced techniques to preserve joints and enhance recovery long-term

Advanced Services at I-SPORT

Complete athlete-care ecosystem under one roof

Movement Analysis Lab

High-end video-biomechanical testing for gait, jump, and change-of-direction assessment

Performance Analysis

Strength, power and functional testing for athlete optimization

Return-to-Sports Rehabilitation

Structured programmes for safe transition back to sport-specific training

Sports Screening

Pre-season screening and injury-risk profiling

Injury Risk Profiling

Tailored programmes to minimize recurrent injury risk

Why Athletes Choose Dr. Sumedh Magar

UK-trained in Sports Medicine & Exercise Science; FIFA Diploma in Football Medicine

Fellowship-trained arthroscopy surgeon specializing in ACL reconstruction and joint preservation

Experience treating professional athletes, footballers, swimmers, runners and weekend sportspersons

Evidence-based rehabilitation protocols for early and safe return to sport

Multidisciplinary facility (I-SPORT) integrating surgery, rehab, performance testing under one roof

Focus on long-term joint health and performance optimization

Patient Testimonials

Hear from athletes who've experienced exceptional care and recovery

Dr. Magar is highly recommended for sportsmen and athletes. He takes the time to listen carefully and explains the science behind his treatments.
